latest_changes: Single-Session Enforcement: Only one device can be logged in at a time. Signing in on a new device automatically kicks the previous session.
Session Guard: Background polling detects when your session has been superseded and redirects to the login screen with a clear message.
Secure Session Tokens: Each login registers a unique session token in the database, ensuring reliable device-level session tracking.

history.notes: Fixed Prospect Interruption Mute, Fixed Audio Engine Startup (scipy bundling), Fixed Microphone Selection, Fixed Call Auto-Download.
Smart Server Selection, Enhanced Update UI, Improved Connection Stability, Call Session Persistence, Metric Refinement, WebRTC VAD.
